messages.content: 在引入掺混空气的条件下成功实现了旋转爆震，但仅在三种含掺混结构的燃烧室中仅在掺混面积最小的燃烧室中获得旋转爆震波
形，而其它两种燃烧室中仅获得了不稳定的爆震波形。这表明掺混结构对旋转爆震波形的形成具有非常重要的作用。需要进一步的研究才能确定最优的掺混结构，以实现稳定的旋转爆震。

By introducing mixed air, successful rotating detonation was achieved, but the rotating detonation waveforms were only obtained in the combustion chamber with the smallest mixed area among the three mixed combustion chambers, while unstable detonation waveforms were obtained in the other two combustion chambers. This indicates that the mixed structure plays a very important role in the formation of rotating detonation waveforms. Further research is needed to determine the optimal mixed structure for stable rotating detonation.
在引入掺混空气的条件下成功实现了旋转爆震并降低了排气温度
Under the condition of mixed air injection, successful rotating detonation was achieved and the exhaust gas temperature was reduced.
在引入掺混空气的条件下成功实现了旋转爆震并成功降低了排气温度
Under the condition of mixed air injection, successful rotating detonation was achieved and the exhaust gas temperature was effectively reduced.
其中A2面积为内外壁面上掺混孔的总面积
Where A2 area refers to the total area of the mixed holes on the inner and outer walls.
在模拟实际发动机燃烧室进口条件下，对掺混结构对煤油-空气两相旋转爆震波的影响展开试验
Experimental tests were carried out on the influence of mixed structure on kerosene-air two-phase rotating detonation wave under the simulated inlet conditions of actual engine combustion chambers.
The airflow rate in Model A is maintained at 1.1 kg/s, whereas Models B, C, and D operate at an airflow rate of 2.6 kg/s. each model have the same throat air inlet
In Model A, the airflow rate is maintained at 1.1 kg/s, while Models B, C, and D operate at an airflow rate of 2.6 kg/s. All models have the same throat air inlet.
In Model A, the airflow rate is maintained at 1.1 kg/s, which is same as model D's throat airflow rate, while Models B, C, and D operate at an airflow rate of 2.6 kg/s.

Correction: 

In Model A, the airflow rate is maintained at 1.1 kg/s, which is the same as the throat airflow rate in Model D, while Models B, C, and D operate at an airflow rate of 2.6 kg/s.
